name: car-diagnosis
desc: Diagnose a car fault from its sound — an honest, end-to-end audio-ML pipeline (scrape → clean → CLAP → calibrated triage). Proof of concept.
descFull: Diagnose a car fault from its sound — an honest, end-to-end audio-ML pipeline (scrape → clean → CLAP → calibrated triage). Proof of concept.

hnPosts.title: Show HN: Classify mechanical faults using Contrastive Language-Audio Pretraining
